LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A single entry in the leaderboard for a specific game.

score.description: The score achieved by the user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who achieved the score.

userAddress.description: The wallet address of the user.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A message posted to the Base Wall.

userId.description: The UID of the user who posted the message.

userAddress.description: The wallet address of the user.

txHash.description: The transaction hash of the onchain log.

/messages/{messageId}.description: Collection of messages posted to the Base Wall.
